title: workflow_started
description: Emitted by BizCity_TwinBrain_Workflow_Pipeline when a /skill workflow begins execution. FE uses node_count to render a skeleton timeline immediately. PHASE-TWB-WORKFLOW W1 (2026-06-19).

skill_slug.description: The /skill slug chosen by the user.

workflow_id.description: DB id from bizcity_automation_workflows; 0 for built-ins.

node_count.description: Total nodes in the graph (enables FE skeleton).
